name: seoul-openapi-mcp
description: MCP server for Seoul Open Data OpenAPI services.

scripts.inspect: pnpm build && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector node dist/index.js
scripts.inspect:wsl: pnpm build && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && WSL_IP=$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}') && TOKEN=$(node -e "console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(32).toString('hex'))") && echo "Open: http://$WSL_IP:6274/?MCP_PROXY_AUTH_TOKEN=$TOKEN\&MCP_PROXY_FULL_ADDRESS=http%3A%2F%2F$WSL_IP%3A6277" && HOST=0.0.0.0 ALLOWED_ORIGINS="http://$WSL_IP:6274,http://localhost:6274" MCP_PROXY_FULL_ADDRESS="http://$WSL_IP:6277" MCP_PROXY_AUTH_TOKEN="$TOKEN" MCP_AUTO_OPEN_ENABLED=false npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector node dist/index.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm build
